hero.subtitle: Bomoto is the all-in-one vehicle companion that tracks your fuel consumption, monitors oil changes, and gives you deep insights into your driving expenses — all with a beautiful, intuitive interface.

features.title: Everything you need for
features.subtitle: Forget paper logs. Manage everything from your pocket with perfect offline synchronization.

item1.title: Consumption Tracking
item1.desc: Record every fill-up and see how your mileage efficiency evolves.

item2.title: Maintenance Reminders
item2.desc: Never miss an oil change again. Bomoto alerts you intelligently based on your trips.

item3.title: Detailed Stats
item3.desc: Visualize your spending by month, trip type, or specific periods.

item4.title: 100% Offline
item4.desc: Your data stays on your phone. No internet needed to log your entries.

screenshots.title: Clean UI, Powerful
screenshots.subtitle: Each screen is crafted for clarity and speed. Find what you need instantly, log data in seconds.

item1.label: Dashboard
item1.title: Smart Dashboard
item1.desc: Instant overview: fuel efficiency, costs, and service reminders at a glance.

item2.label: Fuel Log
item2.title: Fuel Tracking
item2.desc: Log every fill-up with odometer, volume, and cost per liter.

item3.label: Analytics
item3.title: Deep Analytics
item3.desc: Visualize trends over time with beautiful charts.

item4.label: Oil Change
item4.title: Maintenance Alerts
item4.desc: Log oil changes and set up your service intervals.

screenshots.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your costs?
screenshots.ctaText: Join thousands of drivers using Bomoto every day.

download.title: Ready to
download.subtitle: Bomoto is 100% free and works offline. Simple, powerful, and built for your vehicle.

footer.tagline:
The smart vehicle manager.
Drive less. Save more.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Bomoto ("the Application"), developed by RANDRIANARINJAKA Mandresy Fanantenana, collects, uses, and protects your information when you use the mobile application.

storage.title: 1. Local Data Storage
storage.content: The application uses a local SQLite database via the Drift plugin. **IMPORTANT:** No user-entered data (odometer, costs, fuel or maintenance notes) is synchronized, transmitted, or stored on our servers. All your information remains in the physical memory of your phone.

thirdParty.title: 2. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.admob: Google AdMob: We use this service to display advertisements. Google may collect advertising identifiers (AAID on Android, IDFA on iOS) for personalized ads.
thirdParty.notifications: Local Notifications: The application uses local system notifications to generate reminders on your device without using any third-party servers.

rights.title: 3. Your Rights and Data Deletion
rights.content: In accordance with GDPR and CCPA, you maintain full control over your data. Since all data is stored locally, you can permanently delete it at any time by uninstalling the application or clearing the data/cache in your device settings.

permissions.title: 4. Requested Permissions
permissions.internet: Internet Access: Required to load AdMob advertisements.
permissions.storage: Local Storage: Required to save your vehicle database.

children.title: 5. Children's Privacy
children.content: The Application is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect any personally identifiable information from children.

accounts.title: 6. User Accounts
accounts.content: Bomoto does not use any account or login system. Your identity remains anonymous to us.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.content: For any questions regarding this policy, please contact us at: mandreshope@gmail.com
